entries.summary: ThousandEyes webhook alerts now emit normalized `test_id` and `agent_id` dimensions on every alert payload.
entries.details: The Splunk TA for ThousandEyes maps Cisco Cloud Alert API v2 payloads. Release 2025-04 adds stable numeric identifiers so dashboards can correlate path-visualization tests with endpoint agents without parsing free-text alert titles.
entries.spl_impact: Prefer `test_id` and `agent_id` in stats/dedup instead of parsing `_raw` alert subject lines.

entries.summary: Assurance syslog events switched from pipe-delimited to JSON for client health and RF metrics.
entries.details: Catalyst Center 2.3.7 streams assurance telemetry as single-line JSON objects with nested `clientMetrics` instead of legacy `CC|client|mac|rssi|snr` pipe records. Props.conf KV_MODE=json is required for new sourcetype `cisco:dnac:assurance:json`.
entries.spl_impact: Rewrite pipe-token extractions to JSON paths such as `clientMetrics.rssi` and `clientMetrics.snr`.

entries.summary: vManage alarm exports rename `vdevice-name` to `device_host_name` for controller parity.
entries.details: Catalyst SD-WAN release 20.12 aligns alarm field names with Cisco Cloud API conventions. Legacy syslog and REST alarm feeds still populate the old key on downgrade paths but new installs emit only `device_host_name`.
entries.spl_impact: Update UC SPL referencing `vdevice-name` to `device_host_name` or coalesce both during migration.

entries.summary: Webex Control Hub adds `webex:meetings:quality` sourcetype for per-participant media quality metrics.
entries.details: The Webex Splunk Add-on ships a new modular input for meeting quality records including jitter, packet loss, and MOS scores. Existing `webex:meetings:audit` events are unchanged.
entries.spl_impact: Point new UC searches at `sourcetype=webex:meetings:quality` instead of inferring MOS from audit events.

entries.summary: Intersight server alerts expose `policy_name` and `profile_name` on hardware fault events.
entries.details: Intersight SaaS release 1.0.11 enriches UCS and HyperFlex fault notifications with the server profile and policy that triggered remediation workflows, simplifying correlation in Splunk without CMDB lookups.
entries.spl_impact: Use `policy_name` in stats BY clauses when grouping recurring hardware faults.

entries.summary: APIC syslog adds `cisco:aci:epg:stats` stream for endpoint-group byte counters.
entries.details: ACI 6.0(2) publishes per-EPG traffic counters as structured syslog messages consumable by the Splunk TA for ACI. Prior releases required polling the APIC REST API for the same metrics.
entries.spl_impact: Replace REST polling subsearches with `sourcetype=cisco:aci:epg:stats` for EPG throughput dashboards.

entries.summary: FTD connection events deprecate `ConnectionID` in favour of `connection_id` for CEF parity.
entries.details: Secure Firewall 7.4.1 still emits `ConnectionID` on legacy eStreamer feeds but marks it deprecated in CEF extension cs1. New syslog exports populate only lowercase `connection_id`. Splunk extractions should prefer the canonical field.
entries.spl_impact: Normalize on `connection_id`; treat `ConnectionID` as legacy alias during transition.

entries.summary: IOS-XE structured syslog moves interface counters under nested `interface` object.
entries.details: Release 17.12.1 on Catalyst 9k platforms emits JSON syslog where `input_errors` and `output_errors` live under `interface.stats` instead of flat key=value pairs. TA-cisco_ios 5.x props templates expect the nested shape.

entries.summary: ISE RADIUS live logs deprecate `Acct-Status-Type` alias in favour of `acct_status_type`.
entries.details: ISE 3.2 patch 5 normalizes RADIUS accounting attributes to lowercase snake_case in the `cisco:ise:radius` sourcetype. The legacy mixed-case alias remains for one release cycle then is removed from the schema guide.

entries.summary: Meraki security events add `src_port` and `dest_port` on IDS/IPS alerts.
entries.details: The Meraki dashboard API and syslog exports began populating L4 ports on IDS signatures in July 2024. Earlier events only carried IP addresses, forcing rex extractions from the message text.
entries.spl_impact: Use native `src_port`/`dest_port` fields instead of rex on `message` for IDS correlation.

entries.summary: NX-OS telemetry removes deprecated `ifHCInOctets_rate` synthetic field from gRPC exports.
entries.details: Nexus 10.3(2) streaming telemetry no longer computes the legacy rate field; consumers must calculate rates with stream delta or use `ifHCInOctets` counter deltas in Splunk.
entries.spl_impact: Replace direct references to `ifHCInOctets_rate` with delta calculations on `ifHCInOctets`.

entries.summary: UCS Manager faults rename `severity` to `fault_severity` to avoid CIM collision.
entries.details: UCS 4.3(2) fault syslog messages now emit `fault_severity` because the generic `severity` field collided with Splunk CIM Alerts normalization. The Splunk TA for UCS maps both during transition.
entries.spl_impact: Update UC SPL using UCS `severity` to `fault_severity` for fault searches.

entries.summary: Wireless client events sourcetype renamed from `cisco:wlc:client` to `cisco:wlan:client`.
entries.details: Catalyst 9800 controllers unify branding under WLAN in release 17.12.1. The Splunk TA maps the new sourcetype while maintaining a transient alias for upgraded controllers.

entries.summary: ASA 9.20 syslog aligns connection teardown fields with FTD naming (`dst_port` -> `dest_port`).
entries.details: ASA 9.20 (and ASDM 9.20) emit `%ASA-6-302014` teardown messages with `dest_port` instead of the legacy `dst_port` token used since ASA 8.x. Splunk extractions keyed on `dst_port` silently miss events after upgrade.
entries.spl_impact: Update UC SPL referencing `dst_port` to `dest_port` or coalesce both during migration.

entries.summary: Spaces firehose partitions location analytics into `spaces:location:entry` and `spaces:location:dwell` streams.
entries.details: Previously all location events used a single sourcetype. February 2024 firehose schema splits entry vs dwell for occupancy analytics. Both streams share `device_id` and `location_id` keys.
entries.spl_impact: Split occupancy UCs by sourcetype; do not assume a single Spaces location sourcetype.

entries.summary: UCM CDR export retires legacy `cucm:cdr:txt` batch files in favour of SOAP CDR only.
entries.details: Unified Communications Manager 14 SU2 removes flat-file CDR drops used by older Splunk modular inputs. Integrations must consume `cucm:cdr:soap` or the Splunk TA's REST poller.
entries.spl_impact: Retire searches bound to `sourcetype=cucm:cdr:txt`; migrate inputs to SOAP CDR.
